chapter_title.en: Chapter 9 – The congratulations with the birth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/30)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/30)
text: قَالَ رَجُلٌ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وُلِدَ لِي غُلَامٌ فَقَالَ رَزَقَكَ اللَّهُ شُكْرَ الْوَاهِبِ وَ بَارَكَ لَكَ فِي الْمَوْهُوبِ وَ بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ وَ رَزَقَكَ اللَّهُ بِرَّهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Al Husayn, from Morazim, from his brother who said,

‘A man said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A boy has been born for me’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Grant you with thanking the Endower, and Bless for you in the endowment, and Make him reach the adulthood, and may Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Grant you (to observe) his righteousness’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid from his father from Muhammad ibn Sinan from al-Husayn from Murazim from his brother who has said the following: “A man once said to abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘A boy is born to me. 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘May Allah enable you to thank the Benefactor, bless you with the gift and make him to grow up to manhood! May Allah grant you the chance to enjoy his virtuous deeds!’”
